title: Simulation SQL Planner Worker v1
determinism: Must derive SQL planning recommendations only from declared simulation planning artifacts.
Must not emit live DDL into infra/postgres/init without later owner approval.
Must not write to AI-control roots.

notes: Planning scope may target cursors, timelines, checkpoints, tick ledger, or snapshot materializations.
Phase K defines planning surfaces only; no live SQL emission is allowed in this phase.
Future phases may convert approved plans into real DDL artifacts.
